subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-10 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I am feeling a bit better today. For the past few days, I have had to keep my discussions with you all very brief, as it was difficult for me to converse
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز قدری احوالم بهتر است چند روز بود که با شما در نهایت اختصار گفتگو میکردم
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @personal instructions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
